bug.description: magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone

prompt:
There is a magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone downstream of function MCE_app_send_m2ap_session_start_req in the openair2/MCE_APP subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/MCE_APP/mce_app.c:244.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
